Name: Easing Graph Tool
Description:
A professional-grade framework for Unity Graph editors. Developed to standardize and accelerate procedural animation workflows by providing a library of high-performance easing functions.

Key features: seamless integration with Shader Graph/VFX Graph, optimized HLSL backend, and native-like UX.

Documentation: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_Nran_VnYlj_umnT3s7W3gm2Vkj28QzgvBopOQMPHtA/
Website: https://shakoretka.github.io/SwiftXF/

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, HLSL

Name: Technical Art @ Dreadmoor (FPS)
Description:
Architected a unified environment material system for an unannounced FPS (Dreadmoor). Implemented a master-material workflow supporting layered setups, vertex blending, and advanced vegetation shading.

Implemented advanced environmental VFX: stylized water shaders with artistic foam control, volumetric fog using 6-way lighting techniques, and cloud shadow systems.

Engine: UE5
Tools: Material Editor, SpeedTree, Houdini, WPA

Name: Parallax & Space Shaders
Description:
Advanced parallax implementation utilizing Screen Space transformation to simulate infinite depth ('window into dimension' effect). Developed as a technical study on coordinate space transformations. 

Comprehensive technical breakdown published on DTF: https://dtf.ru/gamedev/4110492-prostranstva-v-kompyuternoy-grafike

Engine: UE5 / Unity
Tools: Material Graph, HLSL, Blender

Name: Compute-Driven Game of Life
Description:
High-performance cellular automata simulation leveraging GPU capabilities. Implemented via Compute Shaders to handle massive grid sizes in real-time.

Features procedural seeding through noise functions and parallel state management.

Project: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QNvuFNfBiSn25daHtB4b8bfkUZNc2gWj/

Engine: Unity
Tools: Compute Shaders, C#, HLSL

Name: Water Tunnel VR Systems
Description:
Complex interactive water system specifically optimized for VR constraints. Combines vertex displacement, bone animation, and custom particle behavior to create a seamless environmental transition.

Focused on minimizing overdraw and maintaining high frame rates in XR. 

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, Crest, Substance Designer

Name: Hex-Grid Shield System
Description:
Performance-oriented Sci-Fi shield effect. The entire logic of independent hexagonal plates is contained within a single shader pass to minimize draw calls and CPU overhead.

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, Blender

Name: Article: Technical Implementation of Flow Mapping
Description:
A deep dive into vector-based texture distortion techniques for fluid simulation.  Explores mathematical foundations of flow-mapping and its application in real-time environments.

Article: https://dtf.ru/gamedev/2299716-sheider-potochnogo-dvizheniya-ili-floumaping
Source: https://github.com/76invaders/FlowmapShaderDemo

Name: Article: LCD Screen Emulation
Description:
Detailed research on sub-pixel rendering and UV posterization.  Provides a robust solution for realistic screen displays in modern game engines.

Article: https://dtf.ru/gamedev/2316387-kak-napisat-sheider-lcd-displeya
Project: https://github.com/76invaders/LCDScreenShader
